## Checklist

- [ ] No leftover `Debug.Log` statements
- [ ] All scenes saved before committing
- [ ] All new assets have `.meta` files committed alongside them
- [ ] No unintended files included (check the diff)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `dev`
